intro: Urban Sport blends premium club play with branded experiences that feel social, visual, and easy to book for groups, families, and special sessions.
benefits: Real club environments instead of rented generic venues
Clear offer structure with actual source-poster details
Fast contact routes for booking and event confirmation

items.title: Ghost Padel
items.description: A blacklight padel experience designed as a high-energy club activation rather than a standard court booking.
items.contactLabel: Cynthia on 268 2942 from 8 AM till 4 PM

items.title: Kids Birthday
items.description: A ready-made kids party setup with foot five access, add-on food and drinks, and optional inflatable extras on request.
items.timeLabel: Available everyday 10 AM till 4:30 PM, except Sundays from 10 AM till 4:30 PM
items.priceLabel: Foot 5 Rs 1500 per hour, food package Rs 250 per kid, jumping castle or waterslide Rs 4000 on request

items.title: Private and Corporate Events
items.description: Use the Urban Sport venues for premium private sessions, sponsor hospitality, or structured team formats with club support.
items.timeLabel: Built around your preferred date and format
items.contactLabel: Submit an event brief through the inquiry flow
